summary: Tested Friends Management features: Friends filter in WhosHere.js, Friends tab in Connections.js with Hide/Unhide/Remove actions, and backend API endpoints. All 19 tests passed. Backend APIs (hide-from-matches, unhide-from-matches, DELETE /friends/{friend_id}) are working correctly. Frontend UI components are properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes.
critical_code_review_comments: Friends filter in WhosHere.js (Line 48): Correctly added 'friends' option to MATCH_FILTER_OPTIONS
Friends filter logic (Lines 201-205): Properly filters by friendIds array and excludes hidden from matches
friendIds state (Line 91): Correctly initialized and fetched from /api/friends/list
Friends tab in Connections.js (Line 659): Has correct data-testid='friends-tab'
Hide Friend button (Line 1597): Has data-testid='hide-friend-{id}' and calls handleHideFromMatches
Unhide Friend button (Line 1678): Has data-testid='unhide-friend-{id}' and calls handleUnhideFromMatches
Remove Friend button (Lines 1609, 1689): Has data-testid='remove-friend-{id}' for both visible and hidden friends
Hidden Friends section (Line 1626): Has data-testid='hidden-friends-section' with proper styling
seed_data_creation: Created test users for API testing with unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Friends Management features are fully implemented and tested. The Friends filter in WhosHere.js is a FRONTEND-ONLY filter that filters the venue people list by checking if person.id is in the friendIds array. The Hide/Unhide Friend actions reuse the existing hide-from-matches system. Remove Friend uses DELETE /api/friends/{friend_id}. All data-testid attributes are correctly set for automated testing.

features_verified.Friends filter in WhosHere dropdown: WORKING - Added to MATCH_FILTER_OPTIONS with value 'friends'
features_verified.Friends filter logic: WORKING - Filters by friendIds.includes(p.id) and excludes hiddenFromMatches
features_verified.Friends tab in Connections.js: WORKING - Shows visible friends list with Hide/Remove buttons
features_verified.Hidden Friends section: WORKING - Shows hidden friends with Unhide/Remove buttons
features_verified.Get Hidden from Matches API (GET /api/co: WORKING - Returns list of hidden users
features_verified.Friends List API (GET /api/friends/list): WORKING - Returns list of accepted friends

ui_verification: Friends tab is visible and clickable
Friends tab shows 'No friends yet' empty state correctly
Tab navigation works between Messages, Glances, Icebreakers, Chat Requests, Requests, Friends, and Mutual Connections
